author: Ana García - ana.garcia@email.com
content: Hello, I would like to get more information about collaboration opportunities with your platform for publishing technical articles on architectural glass. Could you outline the process and requirements?

author: Carlos Ruiz - carlos.ruiz@empresa.com
content: Good morning. I am an architect and I am interested in adding my practice to the professionals directory. How can I register and what benefits does the basic profile include?

author: María López - mlopez@consultora.es
content: Dear team, I am writing on behalf of a glass manufacturers association. We are interested in learning about advertising options for sector events. Do you have special packages for associations?

author: Pedro Sánchez - pedro.s@hotmail.com
content: I have found an error on my company profile in the directory. The contact phone number is incorrect. Please contact me to update it.

author: Laura Martínez - laura.martinez@vidrieria.es
content: We are looking for partners for a European project on sustainability in glass manufacturing. Does your platform offer visibility for R&D projects? Thank you.
